name: smoothui-button-copy
title: Copy Button
author: SmoothUI
description: Runs a caller-provided copy action and reports loading, success, and failure without losing focus.

changes: Made feedback depend on the real onCopy promise, added visible and announced failure feedback, guarded repeat activation, and cleaned up timers.
Defaulted the optional minimum loading delay to zero and made the loading icon static.

modifications.change: Made feedback follow the real onCopy promise, defaulted the optional minimum loading delay to zero, added visible and announced failure feedback, guarded repeat activation, cleaned up timers, and made the loading icon static.
modifications.reason: Prevent false success, duplicate operations, continuous hidden work, and updates after unmount while preserving the upstream props.
